name: pody-mcp
description: Public MCP server exposing Pody's live data on Israeli podcasting: studios, podcasts, glossary, and the State of Israeli Podcasts 2026 industry report. Read-only access requires no authentication. Maintained by Pody (Wikidata Q139719199).

tools.name: studios.search
tools.description: Find Israeli podcast studios. Filter by city, max hourly price (NIS), or video capability.

tools.name: studios.get
tools.description: Get profile of a specific studio by slug.

tools.name: podcasts.search
tools.description: Find Israeli podcasts. Filter by category or language (he/en).

tools.name: glossary.lookup
tools.description: Look up a podcasting term. Returns definition + Pody URL. Languages: he/en/ar/ru.

tools.name: industry_report.query
tools.description: Query the State of Israeli Podcasts 2026 report.

tools.name: citation_pulse
tools.description: Return Pody's live infrastructure health from /seo-pulse.
